```r
```r
table_comp <- data.frame(comp = NA, value = NA)
table_cat <- data.frame(Var1 = NA, Var2 = NA, Freq = NA)
table_average <- data.frame()
cells <- data

my_comparisons <- list(c(\LSPC.Cycle\, \LSPC.Quiescent\), c(\cDC.like\, \GMP.like\), c(\cDC.like\, \LSPC.Quiescent\), c(\cDC.like\, \LSPC.Cycle\), c(\cDC.like\, \Ctrl_Myeloid\), c(\Ctrl_Myeloid\, \LSPC.Quiescent\), c(\Ctrl_Myeloid\, \LSPC.Cycle\), c(\Ctrl_Myeloid\, \GMP.like\))

a <- 1
for (i in 2:12) {
  print(colnames(cells)[i])
  cells[,12 + a] <- as.integer(cells[,i] > median(cells[,i], na.rm = TRUE))+1
  colnames(cells)[12 + a] <- paste0(\group_Factor\, i -1)
  m <- table(cells[,1], cells[,12+a])
  m <- data.frame(m)
  m$Var2 <- paste0(\Factor\, i - 1, \_\, m$Var2)
  table_cat  <- rbind(table_cat, m)
  a <- a + 1
  gg <- ggplot(cells, aes(y=cells[,i], x=cell_1, fill = cell_1)) + 
    geom_boxplot()+theme(legend.position = \none\)+ 
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons)+theme_classic()+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))
  ggsave(paste0(\results/figures/boxplots_cell_types_\, colnames(cells)[i],\.png\), height = 6, width = 8)
  
  x <- pairwise.wilcox.test(cells[,i], cells[,1], data=cells, p.adjust.method = \fdr\)
  pval <- data.frame(x$p.value)
  pval$Cells <- rownames(pval)
  pval  <- melt(pval)
  pval$comp <- paste0(pval$Cells, \_\, pval$variable)
  pval <- pval[,c(4, 3)]
  colnames(pval)[2] <- paste0(\Factor\, i - 1)
  table_comp <- cbind(table_comp, pval)
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
rownames(table_comp) <- table_comp[,3]
table_comp <- table_comp[,c(grep(\Factor\, colnames(table_comp)))]
table_comp <- table_comp[!is.na(table_comp$Factor1),]
table_comp[table_comp > 0.05] <- NA

```r
```r
table_sum <- data.frame(cell = NA, factor = NA, mean = NA)

for (i in 2:12) {
  for (cell in cells$cell_1[!duplicated(cells$cell_1)]) {
    m <- mean(cells[cells$cell_1 == cell,i])
    table_2 <- data.frame(cell = cell, factor = paste0(\Factor\, i -1), mean = m)
    table_sum <- rbind(table_sum, table_2)
  }
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

rownames(table_comp) <- gsub(\LSC104_Ng2017_DOWN\, \LSC104.Ng2017.DOWN\, rownames(table_comp))
rownames(table_comp) <- gsub(\LSC104_Ng2017_UP\, \LSC104.Ng2017.UP\, rownames(table_comp))

```r
```r
a <- 1
for (i in 1:11) {
  factor <- paste0(\Factor\, i)
  print(factor)
  for (cell_comp in rownames(table_comp)) {
    cell_1 <- gsub(\.*\\_\, \\, cell_comp)
    cell_2 <- gsub(\\\_.*\, \\, cell_comp)
    print(cell_1)
    print(cell_2)
    m_c1 <- table_sum$mean[table_sum$cell == cell_1 & table_sum$factor == factor & !is.na(table_sum$mean)]
    m_c2 <- table_sum$mean[table_sum$cell == cell_2 & table_sum$factor == factor & !is.na(table_sum$mean)]
    table_comp[rownames(table_comp) == cell_comp, 11 + a] <- log2(m_c2/m_c1)
  }
  a <- a + 1
}

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
colnames(table_comp)[12:22] <- paste0(\LFC_\, 1:11)
table_comp_2 <-  data.frame(table_comp[,12:22])
table_comp <-  data.frame(table_comp[,-c(12:22)])
table_comp_2[is.na(table_comp)] <- rep(NA, length(table_comp[is.na(table_comp)]))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxucm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29tcF8yKSA8LSBnc3ViKFxcX1xcLCBcXF92c19cXCwgcm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29tcF8yKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
rownames(table_comp_2) <- gsub(\_\, \_vs_\, rownames(table_comp_2))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxucm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29tcF8yKSA8LSBnc3ViKFxcTFNDMTA0Lk5nMjAxNy5ET1dOXFwsIFxcTFNDKGRvd24pXFwsIHJvd25hbWVzKHRhYmxlX2NvbXBfMikpXG5yb3duYW1lcyh0YWJsZV9jb21wXzIpIDwtIGdzdWIoXFxMU0MxMDQuTmcyMDE3LlVQXFwsIFxcTFNDKHVwKVxcLCByb3duYW1lcyh0YWJsZV9jb21wXzIpKVxucm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29tcF8yKSA8LSBnc3ViKFxcTUxMLkxTQy5Tb21lcnZhaWxsZTIwMDkuVXBcXCwgXFxNTExfTFNDKHVwKVxcLCByb3duYW1lcyh0YWJsZV9jb21wXzIpKVxucm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29tcF8yKSA8LSBnc3ViKFxcTUxMLkxTQy5Tb21lcnZhaWxsZTIwMDkuRG93blxcLCBcXE1MTF9MU0MoZG93bilcXCwgcm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29tcF8yKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
rownames(table_comp_2) <- gsub(\LSC104.Ng2017.DOWN\, \LSC(down)\, rownames(table_comp_2))
rownames(table_comp_2) <- gsub(\LSC104.Ng2017.UP\, \LSC(up)\, rownames(table_comp_2))
rownames(table_comp_2) <- gsub(\MLL.LSC.Somervaille2009.Up\, \MLL_LSC(up)\, rownames(table_comp_2))
rownames(table_comp_2) <- gsub(\MLL.LSC.Somervaille2009.Down\, \MLL_LSC(down)\, rownames(table_comp_2))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxubGlicmFyeShDb21wbGV4SGVhdG1hcClcbnRhYmxlX2NvbXBfMltpcy5uYSh0YWJsZV9jb21wXzIpXSA8LSAwXG5wZGYoXFxyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvY2VsbF90eXBlc19jb21wYXJpc29uX2ZhY3RvcnMucGRmXFwsIGhlaWdodCA9IDEyLCB3aWR0aCA9IDEwKVxuSGVhdG1hcCh0YWJsZV9jb21wXzIsIG5hbWUgPSBcXExGQ1xcKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
library(ComplexHeatmap)
table_comp_2[is.na(table_comp_2)] <- 0
pdf(\results/figures/cell_types_comparison_factors.pdf\, height = 12, width = 10)
Heatmap(table_comp_2, name = \LFC\)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

dev.off()

<!-- rnb-text-begin -->

## surface proteins / factors / cell types

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZGF0YV9hZHQgPC0gcmVhZC5jc3YoXFwvaG9tZS9mbG9taWsvQ29kZS9NT0ZBX0FNTC9kYXRhL3NlcnZlci9kYXRhX0FEVF9jZWxsX21hcmtlcnNfbm9ybS5jc3ZcXCwgcm93Lm5hbWVzID0gMSlcbmRhdGFfYWR0IDwtIGRhdGEuZnJhbWUodChkYXRhX2FkdCkpXG5kYXRhX2FkdCRDZWxsIDwtIHJvd25hbWVzKGRhdGFfYWR0KVxuZGF0YV9hZHQkQ2VsbCAgPC0gIGdzdWIoXFxcXFxcLlxcLCBcXC1cXCwgZGF0YV9hZHQkQ2VsbClcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
data_adt <- read.csv(\/home/flomik/Code/MOFA_AML/data/server/data_ADT_cell_markers_norm.csv\, row.names = 1)
data_adt <- data.frame(t(data_adt))
data_adt$Cell <- rownames(data_adt)
data_adt$Cell  <-  gsub(\\\.\, \-\, data_adt$Cell)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZGF0YSA8LSByZWFkLmNzdihcXC9ob21lL2Zsb21pay9Db2RlL01PRkFfQU1ML2RhdGEvc2VydmVyL3Njb3Jlc19jZWxsc19hbmRfZmFjdG9yc19DSVRFX3NlcV9jbGVhbi5jc3ZcXClcbnJvd25hbWVzKGRhdGEpIDwtIGRhdGEkWFxuZGF0YSA8LSBkYXRhWyxjKHdoaWNoKGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGEpID09IFxcY2VsbF8xXFwpLCBncmVwKFxcc2NvcmUkXFwsIGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGEpKSldXG5kYXRhJENlbGwgPC0gcm93bmFtZXMoZGF0YSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
data <- read.csv(\/home/flomik/Code/MOFA_AML/data/server/scores_cells_and_factors_CITE_seq_clean.csv\)
rownames(data) <- data$X
data <- data[,c(which(colnames(data) == \cell_1\), grep(\score$\, colnames(data)))]
data$Cell <- rownames(data)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZGF0YSA8LSBtZXJnZShkYXRhLCBkYXRhX2FkdCwgYnkgPSBcXENlbGxcXClcbmRhdGEkQ2VsbCA8LSBOVUxMXG5jb2xuYW1lcyhkYXRhKVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
data <- merge(data, data_adt, by = \Cell\)
data$Cell <- NULL
colnames(data)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiIFsxXSBcXGNlbGxfMVxcICAgICAgICAgIFxcRmFjdG9yXzFfc2NvcmVcXCAgXFxGYWN0b3JfMl9zY29yZVxcICBcXEZhY3Rvcl8zX3Njb3JlXFwgIFxcRmFjdG9yXzRfc2NvcmVcXCAgXFxGYWN0b3JfNV9zY29yZVxcICBcXEZhY3Rvcl82X3Njb3JlXFwgXG4gWzhdIFxcRmFjdG9yXzdfc2NvcmVcXCAgXFxGYWN0b3JfOF9zY29yZVxcICBcXEZhY3Rvcl85X3Njb3JlXFwgIFxcRmFjdG9yXzEwX3Njb3JlXFwgXFxGYWN0b3JfMTFfc2NvcmVcXCBcXENEMTkuVG90YWxBXFwgICAgIFxcQ0QzLlRvdGFsQVxcICAgICBcblsxNV0gXFxDRDE2LlRvdGFsQVxcICAgICBcXENENC5Ub3RhbEFcXCAgICAgIFxcQ0QxMWMuVG90YWxBXFwgICAgXFxDRDU2LlRvdGFsQVxcICAgICBcXENEMTQuVG90YWxBXFwgICAgIFxcQ0Q4LlRvdGFsQVxcICAgICAgXFxDRDQ1LlRvdGFsQVxcICAgIFxuWzIyXSBcXENEMzQuVG90YWxBXFwgICAgIFxcQ0QxNS5Ub3RhbEFcXCAgICAgXFxDRDExNy5Ub3RhbEFcXCAgICBcXENEMjUuVG90YWxBXFwgICAgIFxcQ0QxMjMuVG90YWxBXFwgICAgXFxITEEuRFIuVG90YWxBXFwgIFxuIn0= -->

[1] _1  _1_score  _2_score  _3_score  _4_score  _5_score  _6_score  [8] _7_score  _8_score  _9_score  _10_score _11_score 19.TotalA  3.TotalA 
[15] 16.TotalA  4.TotalA  11c.TotalA  56.TotalA  14.TotalA  8.TotalA  45.TotalA 
[22] 34.TotalA  15.TotalA  117.TotalA  25.TotalA  123.TotalA  .DR.TotalA 




<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuaV9mYWN0b3JzIDwtIHdoaWNoKGdyZXBsKFxcRmFjdG9yXFwsIGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGEpKSlcbmlfcHJvdCA8LSB3aGljaChncmVwbChcXFRvdGFsXFwsIGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGEpKSlcbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
i_factors <- which(grepl(\Factor\, colnames(data)))
i_prot <- which(grepl(\Total\, colnames(data)))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwIDwtIGRhdGFcbmRhdGFfaGVhdG1hcCA8LSBkYXRhX2hlYXRtYXBbZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwJGNlbGxfMSAhPSBcXFVuYXNzaWduZWRcXCxdXG5kYXRhX3R5cGUgPC0gY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YSlbLTFdXG5kYXRhX3R5cGUgPC0gZ3N1YihcXFxcXFxfLipcXCwgXFxcXCwgZGF0YV90eXBlKVxuZGF0YV90eXBlWyFncmVwbChcXEZhY3RvclxcLCBkYXRhX3R5cGUpXSA8LSBcXFN1cmZhY2VfcHJvdGVpbnNcXFxuZGF0YV90eXBlW2RhdGFfdHlwZSA9PSBcXEZhY3RvclxcXSA8LSBcXERESE1zXFxcbmRhdGFfaGVhdG1hcFssMjoxMl0gPC0gc2NhbGUoZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwWywyOjEyXSlcbmRhdGFfaGVhdG1hcFssMTM6bmNvbChkYXRhX2hlYXRtYXApXSA8LSBzY2FsZShkYXRhX2hlYXRtYXBbLDEzOm5jb2woZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwKV0pXG5cbmNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFfaGVhdG1hcCkgPC0gZ3N1YihcXFxcXFxfc2NvcmVcXCwgXFxcXCwgY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwKSlcbmNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFfaGVhdG1hcCkgPC0gZ3N1YihcXEZhY3RvclxcLCBcXERESE1cXCwgY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwKSlcbmNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFfaGVhdG1hcCkgPC0gZ3N1YihcXC5Ub3RhbEFcXCwgXFxcXCwgY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YV9oZWF0bWFwKSlcblxucGRmKFxccmVzdWx0cy9maWd1cmVzL2NlbGxfdHlwZXNfc3VyZmFjZV9wcm90ZWluc19mYWN0b3JzX3RvZ2V0aGVyLnBkZlxcLCB3aWR0aCA9IDEwKVxuSGVhdG1hcChkYXRhX2hlYXRtYXBbLC0xXSwgbmFtZSA9IFxcei1zY29yZVxcLCByb3dfc3BsaXQgPSBjZWxscyRjZWxsXzEsICwgY29sdW1uX3NwbGl0ID0gIGRhdGFfdHlwZSwgc2hvd19yb3dfbmFtZXMgPSBGQUxTRSwgcm93X3RpdGxlX3JvdCA9IDApXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
data_heatmap <- data
data_heatmap <- data_heatmap[data_heatmap$cell_1 != \Unassigned\,]
data_type <- colnames(data)[-1]
data_type <- gsub(\\\_.*\, \\, data_type)
data_type[!grepl(\Factor\, data_type)] <- \Surface_proteins\
data_type[data_type == \Factor\] <- \DDHMs\
data_heatmap[,2:12] <- scale(data_heatmap[,2:12])
data_heatmap[,13:ncol(data_heatmap)] <- scale(data_heatmap[,13:ncol(data_heatmap)])

colnames(data_heatmap) <- gsub(\\\_score\, \\, colnames(data_heatmap))
colnames(data_heatmap) <- gsub(\Factor\, \DDHM\, colnames(data_heatmap))
colnames(data_heatmap) <- gsub(\.TotalA\, \\, colnames(data_heatmap))

pdf(\results/figures/cell_types_surface_proteins_factors_together.pdf\, width = 10)
Heatmap(data_heatmap[,-1], name = \z-score\, row_split = cells$cell_1, , column_split =  data_type, show_row_names = FALSE, row_title_rot = 0)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

## association factor and cell types

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24gPC0gZGF0YS5mcmFtZShWYXIxID0gTkEsIFZhcjIgPSBOQSwgUiA9IE5BLCBwdmFsID0gTkEpXG5cbmZvciAoaSBpbiBpX2ZhY3RvcnMpIHtcbiAgZm9yIChqIGluIGlfcHJvdCkge1xuICAgIHJlcyA8LSBjb3IudGVzdChkYXRhWyxpXSwgZGF0YVssal0sIG1ldGhvZCA9IFwic3BlYXJtYW5cIilcbiAgICBwdmFsIDwtIHJlcyRwLnZhbHVlXG4gICAgUiA8LSByZXMkZXN0aW1hdGVcbiAgICB0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yIDwtIGRhdGEuZnJhbWUoVmFyMSA9IGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGEpW2ldLCBWYXIyID0gY29sbmFtZXMoZGF0YSlbal0sIFIgPSBSLCBwdmFsID0gcHZhbClcbiAgICB0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiA8LSByYmluZCh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiwgdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25fMilcbiAgfVxufVxuXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiRGRFIgPC0gcC5hZGp1c3QodGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kcHZhbCwgXCJmZHJcIilcbnRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJFJbdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kRkRSID4gMC4wNV0gPC0gTkFcbnRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJFJbYWJzKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJFIpIDwgMC40XSA8LSBOQVxuXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiA8LSB0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvblshaXMubmEodGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kUiksXVxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kcHZhbCA8LSBOVUxMXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiRGRFIgPC0gTlVMTFxuXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiA8LSBkY2FzdChWYXIxIH4gVmFyMiwgZGF0YSA9IHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uKVxuXG5yb3duYW1lcyh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbikgPC0gdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kVmFyMVxuXG5wZGYoXCJyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvc2NSTkEvYXNzb2NpYXRpb25fc3VyZmFjZV9wcm90ZWluc19mYWN0b3JzX3NpbmdsZV9jZWxscy5wZGZcIilcbkhlYXRtYXAodGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25bLC0xXSwgY29sdW1uX29yZGVyID0gY29sbmFtZXModGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25bLC0xXSksIHJvd19vcmRlciA9IHJvd25hbWVzKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uWywtMV0pLG5hbWUgPSBcIlJcIilcbmRldi5vZmYoKVxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
table_correlation <- data.frame(Var1 = NA, Var2 = NA, R = NA, pval = NA)

for (i in i_factors) {
  for (j in i_prot) {
    res <- cor.test(data[,i], data[,j], method = "spearman")
    pval <- res$p.value
    R <- res$estimate
    table_correlation_2 <- data.frame(Var1 = colnames(data)[i], Var2 = colnames(data)[j], R = R, pval = pval)
    table_correlation <- rbind(table_correlation, table_correlation_2)
  }
}

table_correlation$FDR <- p.adjust(table_correlation$pval, "fdr")
table_correlation$R[table_correlation$FDR > 0.05] <- NA
table_correlation$R[abs(table_correlation$R) < 0.4] <- NA

table_correlation <- table_correlation[!is.na(table_correlation$R),]
table_correlation$pval <- NULL
table_correlation$FDR <- NULL

table_correlation <- dcast(Var1 ~ Var2, data = table_correlation)

rownames(table_correlation) <- table_correlation$Var1

pdf("results/figures/scRNA/association_surface_proteins_factors_single_cells.pdf")
Heatmap(table_correlation[,-1], column_order = colnames(table_correlation[,-1]), row_order = rownames(table_correlation[,-1]),name = "R")
dev.off()
```r
data <- data[!is.na(data$cell_1),]
table(data$cell_1)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
x <- names(table(data$cell_1))[table(data$cell_1) > 2]
y <- names(table(data$cell_1))[table(data$cell_1) < 2]
data <- data[,c(which(colnames(data) == \cell_1\), grep(\score$\, colnames(data)), grep(\Total\, colnames(data)))]
data <- data[data$cell_1 %in% x,]
table(data$cell_1)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
```r
i_factors <- which(grepl(\Factor\, colnames(data)))
i_cells <- 1
i_prot <- which(grepl(\Total\, colnames(data)))

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->


## association factor and cell types

<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24gPC0gZGF0YS5mcmFtZShDZWxsID0gTkEsIFZhcjEgPSBOQSwgVmFyMiA9IE5BLCBSID0gTkEsIHB2YWwgPSBOQSlcblxuZm9yIChrIGluIGRhdGEkY2VsbF8xWyFkdXBsaWNhdGVkKGRhdGEkY2VsbF8xKV0pIHtcbiAgZGF0YV9zdWIgPC0gZGF0YVtkYXRhJGNlbGxfMSA9PSBrLF1cbiAgZm9yIChpIGluIGlfZmFjdG9ycykge1xuICAgIGZvciAoaiBpbiBpX3Byb3QpIHtcbiAgICAgIHJlcyA8LSBjb3IudGVzdChkYXRhX3N1YlssaV0sIGRhdGFfc3ViWyxqXSwgbWV0aG9kID0gXCJzcGVhcm1hblwiKVxuICAgICAgcHZhbCA8LSByZXMkcC52YWx1ZVxuICAgICAgUiA8LSByZXMkZXN0aW1hdGVcbiAgICAgIHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uXzIgPC0gZGF0YS5mcmFtZShDZWxsID0gaywgVmFyMSA9IGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFfc3ViKVtpXSwgVmFyMiA9IGNvbG5hbWVzKGRhdGFfc3ViKVtqXSwgUiA9IFIsIHB2YWwgPSBwdmFsKVxuICAgICAgdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24gPC0gcmJpbmQodGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24sIHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uXzIpXG4gICAgfVxuICB9XG59XG5cbnRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJEZEUiA8LSBwLmFkanVzdCh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiRwdmFsLCBcImZkclwiKVxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kUlt0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiRGRFIgPiAwLjA1XSA8LSBOQVxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kUlthYnModGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kUikgPCAwLjRdIDwtIE5BXG5cbnRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uXzIgPC0gdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25cblxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24gPC0gdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25bIWlzLm5hKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJFIpLF1cbnRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJHB2YWwgPC0gTlVMTFxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kRkRSIDwtIE5VTExcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
table_correlation <- data.frame(Cell = NA, Var1 = NA, Var2 = NA, R = NA, pval = NA)

for (k in data$cell_1[!duplicated(data$cell_1)]) {
  data_sub <- data[data$cell_1 == k,]
  for (i in i_factors) {
    for (j in i_prot) {
      res <- cor.test(data_sub[,i], data_sub[,j], method = "spearman")
      pval <- res$p.value
      R <- res$estimate
      table_correlation_2 <- data.frame(Cell = k, Var1 = colnames(data_sub)[i], Var2 = colnames(data_sub)[j], R = R, pval = pval)
      table_correlation <- rbind(table_correlation, table_correlation_2)
    }
  }
}

table_correlation$FDR <- p.adjust(table_correlation$pval, "fdr")
table_correlation$R[table_correlation$FDR > 0.05] <- NA
table_correlation$R[abs(table_correlation$R) < 0.4] <- NA

table_correlation_2 <- table_correlation

table_correlation <- table_correlation[!is.na(table_correlation$R),]
table_correlation$pval <- NULL
table_correlation$FDR <- NULL
```r
table_correlation_2 <- table_correlation

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kVmFyMSA8LSBwYXN0ZTAodGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kQ2VsbCwgXFxfXFwsIHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJFZhcjEpXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiRWYXIyIDwtIHBhc3RlMCh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiRDZWxsLCBcXF9cXCwgdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24kVmFyMilcbnRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJENlbGwgPC0gTlVMTFxuXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbiA8LSBkY2FzdChWYXIxIH4gVmFyMiwgZGF0YSA9IHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uLCB2YWx1ZS52YXIgPSBcXFJcXClcblxuY29sX2dyb3VwIDwtIGdzdWIoXFxcXFxcXy4qXFwsIFxcXFwsIGNvbG5hbWVzKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uKVstMV0pXG5cblxucm93bmFtZXModGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24pIDwtIHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uJFZhcjFcbnJvd19ncm91cCA8LSBnc3ViKFxcXFxcXF8uKlxcLCBcXFxcLCByb3duYW1lcyh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbikpXG5cbnJvd25hbWVzKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uKSA8LSBnc3ViKFxcX3Njb3JlXFwsIFxcXFwsIHJvd25hbWVzKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uKSlcblxuXG5wZGYoXFxyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvYXNzb2NpYXRpb25fc3VyZmFjZV9wcm90ZWluc19mYWN0b3JzX3NpbmdsZV9jZWxsc19Kb2hvbl9EaWNrX2NlbGxzLnBkZlxcLCB3aWR0aCA9IDEyLCBoZWlnaHQgPSAxMilcbkhlYXRtYXAoYXMubWF0cml4KHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uWywtMV0pLCBcbiAgICAgICAgY29sdW1uX29yZGVyID0gY29sbmFtZXModGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25bLC0xXSksXG4gICAgICAgIHJvd19vcmRlciA9IHJvd25hbWVzKHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uKSxcbiAgICAgICAgbmFtZSA9IFxcUlxcLCBcbiAgICAgICAgY29sdW1uX3NwbGl0ID0gY29sX2dyb3VwLCBcbiAgICAgICAgcm93X3NwbGl0ID0gcm93X2dyb3VwLFxuICAgICAgICByb3dfbGFiZWxzID0gZ3N1YihcXC4qXFxcXF9GXFwsIFxcRlxcLCByb3duYW1lcyh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbikpLFxuICAgICAgICBjb2x1bW5fbGFiZWxzID0gZ3N1YihcXC4qXFxcXF9cXCwgXFxcXCwgY29sbmFtZXModGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb24pWy0xXSlcbiAgICAgICAgKVxuZGV2Lm9mZigpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
table_correlation$Var1 <- paste0(table_correlation$Cell, \_\, table_correlation$Var1)
table_correlation$Var2 <- paste0(table_correlation$Cell, \_\, table_correlation$Var2)
table_correlation$Cell <- NULL

table_correlation <- dcast(Var1 ~ Var2, data = table_correlation, value.var = \R\)

col_group <- gsub(\\\_.*\, \\, colnames(table_correlation)[-1])


rownames(table_correlation) <- table_correlation$Var1
row_group <- gsub(\\\_.*\, \\, rownames(table_correlation))

rownames(table_correlation) <- gsub(\_score\, \\, rownames(table_correlation))


pdf(\results/figures/association_surface_proteins_factors_single_cells_Johon_Dick_cells.pdf\, width = 12, height = 12)
Heatmap(as.matrix(table_correlation[,-1]), 
        column_order = colnames(table_correlation[,-1]),
        row_order = rownames(table_correlation),
        name = \R\, 
        column_split = col_group, 
        row_split = row_group,
        row_labels = gsub(\.*\\_F\, \F\, rownames(table_correlation)),
        column_labels = gsub(\.*\\_\, \\, colnames(table_correlation)[-1])
        )
dev.off()

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

```r
table_correlation_2$Cell <- as.factor(table_correlation_2$Cell)
cells <- levels(table_correlation_2$Cell)
table_correlation_2$Cell <- as.integer(table_correlation_2$Cell)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25fMiRWYXIxIDwtIGdzdWIoXFxfc2NvcmVcXCwgXFxcXCwgdGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25fMiRWYXIxKVxudGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25fMiRWYXIxIDwtIGZhY3Rvcih0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yJFZhcjEsIGxldmVscyA9IHBhc3RlMChcXEZhY3Rvcl9cXCwgMToxMSkpXG5mYWN0b3JzIDwtIGxldmVscyh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yJFZhcjEpXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yJFZhcjEgPC0gYXMuaW50ZWdlcih0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yJFZhcjEpXG50YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yIDwtIHRhYmxlX2NvcnJlbGF0aW9uXzJbb3JkZXIodGFibGVfY29ycmVsYXRpb25fMiRDZWxsLCB0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yJFZhcjEpLF1cbmBgYFxuYGBgIn0= -->

```r
```r
table_correlation_2$Var1 <- gsub(\_score\, \\, table_correlation_2$Var1)
table_correlation_2$Var1 <- factor(table_correlation_2$Var1, levels = paste0(\Factor_\, 1:11))
factors <- levels(table_correlation_2$Var1)
table_correlation_2$Var1 <- as.integer(table_correlation_2$Var1)
table_correlation_2 <- table_correlation_2[order(table_correlation_2$Cell, table_correlation_2$Var1),]

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudGYzLm0gPC0gbWVsdCh0YWJsZV9jb3JyZWxhdGlvbl8yLCBpZC52YXJzID0gYyhcXFZhcjJcXCkpXG50ZjMubSR2YXIyIDwtIE5BXG50ZjMubVt0ZjMubSR2YXJpYWJsZSA9PSBcXENlbGxcXCxdJHZhcjIgPC0gMVxudGYzLm1bdGYzLm0kdmFyaWFibGUgPT0gXFxWYXIxXFwsXSR2YXIyIDwtIDJcbnRmMy5tW3RmMy5tJHZhcmlhYmxlID09IFxcUlxcLF0kdmFyMiA8LSAzXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
tf3.m <- melt(table_correlation_2, id.vars = c(\Var2\))
tf3.m$var2 <- NA
tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \Cell\,]$var2 <- 1
tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \Var1\,]$var2 <- 2
tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \R\,]$var2 <- 3

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxudGYzLmxhYnMgPC0gc3Vic2V0KHRmMy5tLCB2YXJpYWJsZSA9PSBcXFJcXClcbnRmMy5sYWJzJGFuZyA8LSBzZXEoZnJvbT0oMzYwL25yb3codGYzLmxhYnMpKS8xLjUsIFxuICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICB0bz0oMS41KiAoMzYwL25yb3codGYzLmxhYnMpKSktMzYwLCBcbiAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgICAgbGVuZ3RoLm91dD1ucm93KHRmMy5sYWJzKSkrODBcblxudGYzLmxhYnMkaGp1c3QgPC0gMFxudGYzLmxhYnMkaGp1c3Rbd2hpY2godGYzLmxhYnMkYW5nIDwgLTkwKV0gPC0gMVxudGYzLmxhYnMkYW5nW3doaWNoKHRmMy5sYWJzJGFuZyA8IC05MCldIDwtICgxODArdGYzLmxhYnMkYW5nKVt3aGljaCh0ZjMubGFicyRhbmcgPCAtOTApXVxuYGBgXG5gYGAifQ== -->

```r
```r
tf3.labs <- subset(tf3.m, variable == \R\)
tf3.labs$ang <- seq(from=(360/nrow(tf3.labs))/1.5, 
                    to=(1.5* (360/nrow(tf3.labs)))-360, 
                    length.out=nrow(tf3.labs))+80

tf3.labs$hjust <- 0
tf3.labs$hjust[which(tf3.labs$ang < -90)] <- 1
tf3.labs$ang[which(tf3.labs$ang < -90)] <- (180+tf3.labs$ang)[which(tf3.labs$ang < -90)]

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->


<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxuaGlnaF9jb2wgPC1cXCNkZjc2NGNcXFxubG93X2NvbCA8LSBcXCM0Y2I1ZGZcXFxuY29sX2IgPC0gXFxncmV5XFxcbm15Y29sc19jZWxscyA8LSBicmV3ZXIucGFsKG4gPSA4LCBuYW1lID0gXFxTZXQxXFwpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

```r
```r
high_col <-\#df764c\
low_col <- \#4cb5df\
col_b <- \grey\
mycols_cells <- brewer.pal(n = 8, name = \Set1\)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->


<!-- rnb-text-begin -->



<!-- rnb-text-end -->


<!-- rnb-chunk-begin -->

\#4076A9\,
\#ABCADA\,
\#BED797\,
\#5E9F48\,
\#F1EFB3\,
\#EEC17F\,
\#E88840\,
\#E99D9B\,

\#BCB2C9\)

-->

```r
```r
ptf3<-ggplot( ) +
  geom_tile(data=tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \Cell\,],
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)),y=var2, fill=factor(value)),
            colour=col_b, size = 0) +  ylim(c(0, max(tf3.m$var2) + 1.5))+ scale_fill_manual(\Cell\, values = mycols_cells, 
                      labels = cells) +
  new_scale(\fill\) +   #### MAGIC
  geom_tile(data=tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \Var1\,],
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)),y=var2, fill=factor(value)),
            colour=col_b, size = 0) +  ylim(c(0, max(tf3.m$var2) + 1.5))+ scale_fill_manual(\Factor\, values = mycols_factors, 
                      labels = factors) +
  new_scale(\fill\) +   #### MAGIC
  geom_tile(data=tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \R\,],
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)),y=var2, fill=value),
            colour=col_b, size = 0.1) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(midpoint=0, mid=\white\, low=low_col, high=high_col, limits = c(-1, 1), name=\R\, na.value=\white\)+

  ylim(c(0, max(tf3.m$var2) + 1.5)) +
  coord_polar(theta=\x\) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), # bg of the panel
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # get rid of major grid
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # get rid of minor grid
        axis.title=element_blank(),
        panel.grid=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=0))+
  geom_text(data=tf3.labs, 
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)), 
                y=var2+0.75, 
                label=Var2, angle=ang, hjust=hjust), 
            size=2.5)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-output-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiV2FybmluZzogVXNpbmcgYHNpemVgIGFlc3RoZXRpYyBmb3IgbGluZXMgd2FzIGRlcHJlY2F0ZWQgaW4gZ2dwbG90MiAzLjQuMC5cblBsZWFzZSB1c2UgYGxpbmV3aWR0aGAgaW5zdGVhZC5TY2FsZSBmb3IgeSBpcyBhbHJlYWR5IHByZXNlbnQuXG5BZGRpbmcgYW5vdGhlciBzY2FsZSBmb3IgeSwgd2hpY2ggd2lsbCByZXBsYWNlIHRoZSBleGlzdGluZyBzY2FsZS5TY2FsZSBmb3IgeSBpcyBhbHJlYWR5IHByZXNlbnQuXG5BZGRpbmcgYW5vdGhlciBzY2FsZSBmb3IgeSwgd2hpY2ggd2lsbCByZXBsYWNlIHRoZSBleGlzdGluZyBzY2FsZS5cbiJ9 -->

<!-- rnb-output-end -->

<!-- rnb-source-begin eyJkYXRhIjoiYGBgclxuYGBgclxucGxvdChwdGYzKVxuXG5nZ3NhdmUoXFxyZXN1bHRzL2ZpZ3VyZXMvY2lyY2xlX3N1cmZhY2VfcHJvdGVpbnNfZmFjdG9yc19zdW1tYXJ5LnBuZ1xcLCB3aWR0aCA9IDcsIGhlaWdodCA9IDcpXG5gYGBcbmBgYCJ9 -->

plot(ptf3)

ggsave(\results/figures/circle_surface_proteins_factors_summary.png\, width = 7, height = 7)

```r
```r
col_b <- \white\

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

<!-- rnb-chunk-end -->

```r
```r
ptf3<-ggplot( ) +
  geom_tile(data=tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \Cell\,],
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)),y=var2, fill=factor(value)),
            colour=col_b, size = 0) +  ylim(c(0, max(tf3.m$var2) + 1.5))+ scale_fill_manual(\Cell\, values = mycols_cells, 
                      labels = cells) +
  new_scale(\fill\) +   #### MAGIC
  geom_tile(data=tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \Var1\,],
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)),y=var2, fill=factor(value)),
            colour=col_b, size = 0) +  ylim(c(0, max(tf3.m$var2) + 1.5))+ scale_fill_manual(\Factor\, values = mycols_factors, 
                      labels = factors) +
  new_scale(\fill\) +   #### MAGIC
  geom_tile(data=tf3.m[tf3.m$variable == \R\,],
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)),y=var2, fill=value),
            colour=col_b, size = 0.3) +
            scale_fill_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = \RdBu\)), name=\R\, limits = c(-1, 1), na.value=\white\)+

  ylim(c(0, max(tf3.m$var2) + 1.5)) +
  coord_polar(theta=\x\) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(), # bg of the panel
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), # get rid of major grid
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), # get rid of minor grid
        axis.title=element_blank(),
        panel.grid=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks=element_blank(),
        axis.text.y=element_text(size=0))+
  geom_text(data=tf3.labs, 
            aes(x=as.numeric(rownames(tf3.labs)), 
                y=var2+0.75, 
                label=Var2, angle=ang, hjust=hjust), 
            size=2.5)

<!-- rnb-source-end -->

plot(ptf3)
